item.title: Nobody Came, So I Did
item.description: When the team didn’t show up during a snowstorm, I stepped in to keep things moving. A look at determination, responsibility, and getting the job done.

media:content.media:title: Nobody Came, So I Did
media:content.media:description: When the team didn’t show up during a snowstorm, I stepped in to keep things moving. A look at determination, responsibility, and getting the job done.

item.title: Old School Buggy vs. Steep Hill
item.description: Watch a classic buggy tackle a steep hill, showcasing its power and agility. A fun look at vintage off-road driving and challenging terrain.

media:content.media:title: Old School Buggy vs. Steep Hill
media:content.media:description: Watch a classic buggy tackle a steep hill, showcasing its power and agility. A fun look at vintage off-road driving and challenging terrain.

item.title: Bathroom Emergency on the Job
item.description: A sudden bathroom emergency interrupts the workday, leading to a funny and relatable moment on site. A lighthearted look at real-life construction challenges.

media:content.media:title: Bathroom Emergency on the Job
media:content.media:description: A sudden bathroom emergency interrupts the workday, leading to a funny and relatable moment on site. A lighthearted look at real-life construction challenges.

item.title: Brand New Concrete Ruined
item.description: Someone accidentally stepped on freshly poured concrete, creating an unexpected setback. Here’s how the situation unfolded and what can be done to fix it.

media:content.media:title: Brand New Concrete Ruined
media:content.media:description: Someone accidentally stepped on freshly poured concrete, creating an unexpected setback. Here’s how the situation unfolded and what can be done to fix it.

item.title: City Orders Fence Removal
item.description: Local authorities require the removal of a fence due to regulations and wildlife concerns. A look at the challenge and what comes next for the property owner.

media:content.media:title: City Orders Fence Removal
media:content.media:description: Local authorities require the removal of a fence due to regulations and wildlife concerns. A look at the challenge and what comes next for the property owner.

item.title: Forgot Spanish Mid-Conversation
item.description: A funny language moment when Spanish slipped my mind mid-conversation. A lighthearted look at language learning and those “wait, what?” moments.

media:content.media:title: Forgot Spanish Mid-Conversation
media:content.media:description: A funny language moment when Spanish slipped my mind mid-conversation. A lighthearted look at language learning and those “wait, what?” moments.

item.title: Who Cut That Off?!
item.description: A surprising construction mishap caught on camera. Highlights the challenges and unexpected moments that happen on the jobsite.

media:content.media:title: Who Cut That Off?!
media:content.media:description: A surprising construction mishap caught on camera. Highlights the challenges and unexpected moments that happen on the jobsite.

item.title: Mistaken for a Worker… It Worked!
item.description: A clever moment where blending in on a jobsite pays off. Shows creativity and quick thinking in unexpected situations.

media:content.media:title: Mistaken for a Worker… It Worked!
media:content.media:description: A clever moment where blending in on a jobsite pays off. Shows creativity and quick thinking in unexpected situations.
